hook: An AI college strategist that tells your teen the right 8 schools — not the safety + reach lottery.
core_problem: 3.8M US high school seniors apply to college; private counselors charge $5-25k; Common App generic; results vary wildly.
ai_leverage: Profile-modeling agent matches teen to schools by fit + admit rate; essay agent gives feedback; financial-aid agent maximizes net cost.
distribution_strategy: High school + parent community + influencer channel.
retention_loop: Per-teen profile + essay corpus lock; siblings reuse.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-school admit-outcome corpus from past users improves matching.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C juniors + seniors. Stage 2: full college + grad-school + first-job platform. Stage 3: youth-future planning OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + FERPA + state minor education
fake_ai_trap: human counselor reviews essays + plans
validation_invocation: Per-school admit-outcome corpus is asymmetric; existing tools rely on generic guides.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Common App API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-teen profile, application history, school admit data.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Human counselor signs every essay edit + final list.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen answers profile questions; agent ranks schools + drafts essays.

hook: A teen-job marketplace that vets shifts + pay + safety so parents say yes.
core_problem: 16M US teens 14-18 want first jobs; existing platforms (Snagajob) treat teens as adults; safety + parent consent are friction.
ai_leverage: Verification agent runs employer + role checks; matching agent picks shifts by teen schedule + parent rules.

moat_potential.rationale: State teen-labor law expertise + parent consent flow.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: hourly + summer jobs. Stage 2: full youth-employment OS. Stage 3: first-finance + insurance + benefits.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state teen labor + child labor + work-permit
unsustainable_unit_economics: marketplace + verification keep margin healthy
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for teens + parents + employers.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Stripe Connect + Checkr
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-teen schedule, employer history, parent rules.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent approves every shift; ops verifies employers.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen browses; parent approves; agent handles scheduling + payroll.

hook: A teen mental-health check-in that escalates to a clinician before the parent has to find out.
core_problem: 30M US teens face mental-health crisis; access to therapists is months long; existing apps (Calm, Headspace) lack escalation.
ai_leverage: Voice + text agent baselines mood; risk agent triages severity; clinician agent connects when warranted.
retention_loop: Per-teen mood corpus + clinician relationship lock.
scalability_rationale: Clinical license footprint gates; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C teens + parents. Stage 2: school + insurance bundle. Stage 3: full youth mental-health OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + state telehealth + minor consent
fake_ai_trap: licensed clinician reviews any escalation
validation_invocation: Defensible clinical + reimbursement moat; reject vanity DAU.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + WebRTC + EHR integration
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Licensed clinician reviews any 'high risk' flag before action.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen does a 60s daily check-in via voice; clinician reaches out only if warranted.

hook: Teen-driver coaching telematics that drops accident rates — and insurance — without parents nagging.
core_problem: 16-19 year-old drivers have 3x crash rate; insurance ranges $4-9k/yr; existing solutions (Bouncie, Allstate Drivewise) lack coaching.
ai_leverage: Telematics agent classifies risky behaviors; coaching agent gives in-the-moment voice feedback; reward agent unlocks privileges.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-teen behavior + outcome corpus improves coaching.

scalability_rationale: Hardware + insurance partnership gates; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: teen drivers. Stage 2: full youth-driving + insurance OS. Stage 3: full driving + insurance bundle for high-risk classes.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state DMV + minor data privacy
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own coaching engine
validation_invocation: Insurance + behavioral moat compounds; reject vanity install counts.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + OBD-II BLE + voice
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-teen telemetry, accident corpus, insurance outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent reviews any risk escalation; insurance partner verifies discount eligibility.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen drives; agent coaches in real time; parent sees a weekly digest.

hook: A creator-economy starter kit that turns a teen's TikTok into a small business by 18.
core_problem: 30M teen creators lack business education; existing platforms (Linktree, Beacons) are tools, not education.
ai_leverage: Content + monetization agent suggests next steps; finance agent handles taxes + savings; mentor agent connects to creator coaches.
retention_loop: Per-teen creator history + brand relationships lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-teen creator outcome corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: teen creators. Stage 2: full youth entrepreneurship platform. Stage 3: youth finance + insurance bundle.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + FTC minor endorsement + state minor finance
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own per-teen outcome corpus
validation_invocation: Per-teen creator outcome data is asymmetric; platforms see one product.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + TikTok/IG API + Stripe
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent approves brand partnerships >$500; ops reviews disputes.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen logs growth; agent suggests next move + handles taxes.

hook: A crypto + investing simulator that teaches teens with paper money, not Robinhood addiction.
core_problem: 20M teens dabble in crypto + meme stocks; financial literacy is missing; regulators worry about minor exposure.
ai_leverage: Simulator agent runs portfolios with real-time market data; coaching agent explains decisions; risk agent flags pattern recognition issues.
retention_loop: Per-teen portfolio history + financial literacy progression lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-teen behavior + outcome corpus improves coaching.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C teens. Stage 2: full youth-finance education OS. Stage 3: licensed minor brokerage at 18.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + FINRA minor brokerage rules
fake_ai_trap: financial advisor reviews every coaching decision
validation_invocation: Defensible parent-trust + education brand; reject vanity minor brokerage growth.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-teen portfolio history, market data, coaching outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Parent approves any real-money transition at 18; advisor reviews curricula.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen builds portfolio; chat to ask 'why is NVDA down' + gets explanation.

hook: A teen messenger that catches predator + cyberbully patterns before parents have to.
core_problem: 70M US teens face online safety risks; parents lose visibility post-iMessage age; existing parental controls are blunt.
ai_leverage: Pattern-detection agent classifies threat patterns; intervention agent notifies teen + parent + escalates per severity.
monetization_logic: $10/mo per family + school district enterprise tier.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-teen pattern + outcome corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: school district. Stage 3: full youth digital safety OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + state minor consent + FTC
fake_ai_trap: trained reviewers for every escalation

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + custom NLP
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-teen interaction patterns, threat corpus, intervention outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trained reviewers verify every threat escalation; parents and teens approve sharing.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen messages naturally; parent gets notified only when warranted.

hook: A youth skill-credentialing platform that turns side projects into proof for college + first job.
core_problem: 10M US teens learn skills outside school (coding, design, music); employers + colleges discount unverified work.
ai_leverage: Project-validation agent verifies authorship + skill; credentialing agent issues verifiable badges; matching agent ranks teens to opportunities.
retention_loop: Per-teen skill corpus + credential history lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Two-sided teen + employer + college network compounds.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C teens. Stage 2: full youth credential + opportunity OS. Stage 3: licensed K-12 + post-secondary credentialing.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + FERPA + state youth credential
fake_ai_trap: human reviewers verify each credential
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for teens + colleges + employers.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-teen skill corpus, project outcomes, employer + college metadata.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Reviewer signs each credential; employer verifies matched candidates.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen uploads project; agent verifies; credential issued; opportunities surfaced.

hook: A volunteer-hours tracker that proves the impact, not just the count, for college apps.
core_problem: 20M US teens log volunteer hours; colleges + scholarships discount unverified counts; current tools (MobileServe) are paper-era.
ai_leverage: Verification agent confirms hours + impact; storytelling agent generates essay-ready narratives.
retention_loop: Per-teen impact corpus + nonprofit relationships lock.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: high-school teens. Stage 2: full youth + civic engagement OS. Stage 3: bundled with college + scholarship matching.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + FERPA + state youth + nonprofit
fake_ai_trap: nonprofit signs each hour log
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for teens + nonprofits + colleges.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Nonprofit verifies each log; reviewer signs each impact statement.

ui_ux_invocation: Teen logs hours; agent verifies + drafts impact narrative.

hook: A homework copilot that asks the question instead of giving the answer.
core_problem: 60M US K-12 students use ChatGPT to cheat; teachers can't detect; learning erodes.
ai_leverage: Pedagogy agent uses Socratic prompts; verification agent confirms understanding via comprehension checks.
monetization_logic: $10-15/mo per student + school district enterprise tier.
retention_loop: Per-student progression corpus + teacher integration lock.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C students. Stage 2: full district EdTech bundle. Stage 3: full youth-learning OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: COPPA + FERPA + state EdTech
fake_ai_trap: teacher reviews student progression weekly
validation_invocation: Per-student understanding corpus is asymmetric; LLM tutors give the answer, we measure mastery.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + custom Socratic LLM
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-student session corpus, comprehension outcomes, teacher feedback.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Teacher signs every weekly progress report.

ui_ux_invocation: Student asks question; agent asks better question back; teacher sees mastery.
